Temple Tours

At a Glance: Mahabalipuram & ECR Temples

Best For: Pilgrims & Heritage Lovers
Pickup: Anywhere in Chennai
Safety: Verified Drivers & Sanitized Cars
Booking: Instant via WhatsApp

Mahabalipuram & ECR Temples

Explore the UNESCO World Heritage sites of Mahabalipuram including the Shore Temple, Five Rathas, and Arjuna's Penance. Enjoy a scenic drive along the East Coast Road (ECR) with options to visit other temples en route.

Route Plan

1

Chennai Start

Pickup at 8:00 AM.

2

ECR Stops

Iskcon, DakshinaChitra, or Crocodile Bank (Optional).

3

Mahabalipuram

Shore Temple, Five Rathas, Arjuna's Penance.

4

Sea Shell Museum

Visit India's largest seashell museum.

5

Chennai Drop

Return by 7:00 PM.

Tariff & Pricing

VehiclePackage TypeTotal Cost
SedanFull Day Trip₹3,500
SUV (Ertiga)Full Day Trip₹4,500
InnovaFull Day Trip₹5,500
CrystaFull Day Trip₹6,500
Tempo TravellerFull Day Trip₹8,000

Includes: Fuel, Driver Bata, Parking. Excludes: Entry tickets, Food.

What's Included

  • Sightseeing assistance
  • Flexible timings
  • Comfortable AC car

Travel Guide & Tips

History & Significance

Mahabalipuram (Mamallapuram) was a bustling seaport of the Pallava kings in the 7th century. It is known for its rock-cut temples and is a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

Darshan Timings

Monuments: 6:00 AM – 6:00 PM Light House: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Dress Code

Comfortable cotton clothes, hat/cap, and walking shoes recommended.

Pro Tips for First-Timers

  • Carry an umbrella and water (it gets hot).
  • Visit Krishna's Butter Ball for unique photos.
  • Sea Shell Museum is great for kids.
  • Don't miss the Shore Temple at sunset.
